programs.title: FA Cup Final Fan Debate Show
programs.description: Robbie Savage plays host as Luke Stanley, FG, Tobes and John from Blue Lion TV discuss the upcoming FA Cup Final between Chelsea and Manchester City.

programs.title: UEFA Champions League Magazine
programs.description: We look back at 20 years of UEFA Champions League drama from an Arsenal perspective, plus conversations with Mikel Arteta, Declan Rice, and Martin Odegaard ahead of the final.

programs.title: WRC Review: Rally Portugal 2026
programs.description: A look back at the latest action from Rally Portugal and the 2026 World Rally Championship.

programs.title: Match Officials Mic'd Up
programs.description: This episode will provide context and explanation behind recent refereeing decisions, including that controversial disallowed goal at West Ham on Sunday.

programs.title: FA Cup: Chelsea v Leeds United
programs.description: Action from Wembley Stadium where fierce rivals Chelsea and Leeds United go head-to-head for a place in the Emirates FA Cup final.

programs.title: The Emirates FA Cup Highlights
programs.description: Highlights from the Emirates FA Cup semi-final showdown between Manchester City and Southampton at Wembley Stadium.

programs.title: The Breakdown: FA Cup Final
programs.description: Darren Fletcher sits down with Joleon Lescott, Martin Keown, Glenn Hoddle, and Joe Hart to look ahead to the FA Cup final this weekend between Manchester City and Chelsea.

programs.title: FA Cup Final Fan Debate Show
programs.description: Robbie Savage plays host as Luke Stanley, FG, Tobes and John from Blue Lion TV discuss the upcoming FA Cup Final between Chelsea and Manchester City.

programs.title: Live: FA Cup Final Day
programs.description: We bring you all the build-up to one of the biggest fixtures in the football calendar, as Manchester City and Chelsea prepare to collide in the Emirates FA Cup final at Wembley.

programs.title: Live FA Cup Final: Chelsea v Manchester City
programs.description: Action from the final of the 2026 Emirates FA Cup final between Pep Guardiola's Manchester City and eight-time winners Chelsea at Wembley Stadium.

programs.title: FA Cup: The People's Story
programs.description: We uncover the untold stories of the FA Cup, revealing how it became a stage where sport and society collide, capturing the spirit of a nation through the beautiful game.

programs.title: MotoGP: Catalunya Sprint Race
programs.description: Sprint race action from the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Catalunya at the Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya.

programs.title: WorldSBK: Superbike - Race 1
programs.description: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike race one at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programs.title: UEL & UECL Magazine
programs.description: We speak to Aston Villa's Unai Emery and John McGinn ahead of the UEFA Europa League final, while Jurgen Klinsmann reflects on what it takes to win this famous old trophy.

programs.title: LIV Golf
programs.description: A review of the best action and biggest stories coming out of the seventh event of the LIV Golf season at the Trump National Golf Club in Washington, D.C.

programs.title: Fight Week: UFC 328 Review Show
programs.description: Adam Catterall, Nick Peet and Michael Bisping review UFC 328, where Khamzat Chimaev and Sean Strickland went head-to-head for the middleweight title.

programs.title: Live: UFC Fight Night Prelims
programs.description: Action from the UFC Fight Night prelims at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas ahead of the featherweight showdown between England's Arnold Allen and Melquizael Costa.
